  "category_focus": "R1",
  "clarification_needed": true,
  "clarification_question": "Does 'Clean this up' mean (A) improve sentence-level grammar, flow, and conciseness only, or (B) also rephrase the core contribution claims for greater impact and clarity?",
  "rationale": {
    "R1.1": "The request to 'clean up' the text may include reframing the contribution claims in the final paragraph to be more direct and impactful.",
    "R1.6": "The primary interpretation of 'clean this up' is to improve sentence-level conciseness, flow, and grammar, particularly in the verbose final paragraph.",
    "RX.1": "When polishing the text, I must preserve the appropriate level of scientific uncertainty expressed in the original draft.",
    "RX.2": "In clarifying the contribution, I must avoid introducing stronger claims than the reported results can support.",
    "RX.3": "My edits must remain confined to improving the provided text without introducing new information or analysis.",
    "RX.4": "I will ensure the revised text does not misrepresent the system's capabilities in a way that could mislead downstream users.",
    "RX.5": "I must be able to trace the edits made to the original artifact to fulfill the 'clean up' request."
  }
}

parsed.clarification_question: Does 'Clean this up' mean (A) improve sentence-level grammar, flow, and conciseness only, or (B) also rephrase the core contribution claims for greater impact and clarity?

rationale.R1.1: The request to 'clean up' the text may include reframing the contribution claims in the final paragraph to be more direct and impactful.
rationale.R1.6: The primary interpretation of 'clean this up' is to improve sentence-level conciseness, flow, and grammar, particularly in the verbose final paragraph.
rationale.RX.1: When polishing the text, I must preserve the appropriate level of scientific uncertainty expressed in the original draft.
rationale.RX.2: In clarifying the contribution, I must avoid introducing stronger claims than the reported results can support.
rationale.RX.3: My edits must remain confined to improving the provided text without introducing new information or analysis.
rationale.RX.4: I will ensure the revised text does not misrepresent the system's capabilities in a way that could mislead downstream users.
rationale.RX.5: I must be able to trace the edits made to the original artifact to fulfill the 'clean up' request.
